title: festuca fluitans var. loliacea
intro: Festuca fluitans var. loliacea, also known as blue fescue, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of blue fescue include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to aid in wound healing. Blue fescue can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat respiratory and skin-related ailments.
